text:
- Update to 2.00

This also has the same small workaround as the x11-toolkits/scintilla port,
but since a fix was found, feel free to fix it correctly.  As the update
to x11-toolkits/scintilla is still being worked on, I am unsure what the
fix is yet.

(Requires ports/137675 to be committed first)
